headline: UniFirst (UNF) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of workplace uniform provider UniFirst (NYSE:UNF) jumped 15.8% in the afternoon session after reports revealed its rival, Cintas, was in advanced talks to acquire the company at a significant premium.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Cintas (CTAS) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Cintas is fairly priced or if you might be paying a premium for its stock right now, this article will walk you through what the numbers indicate about its valuation. Cintas shares most recently closed at US$200.12, with returns of 0.9% over 7 days, 4.9% over 30 days, 8.2% year to date, 0.6% over 1 year, 89.2% over 3 years and 132.8% over 5 years.
